calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-27-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of two Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Jacqueline Chan.
Petitioner: Lai Yin Eliza Ho, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Felix Ho and Feco Ho, and with Cantonese Interpreter: William Guan.
Co-Petitioner/Minors' Father: Chi Keung Timothy Siu, not present, but signed the Petition consenting to the name change of the Minors.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and direct examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to: Felix Siu and Feco Siu.
Decree signed in open court.
